subject: System and method for a cloud callback platform (US 2021/0321002 A1)

dialog.body: Cloud callback platform comprising a profile manager, callback manager, interaction manager, media server, context analysis engine, and context aggregator mechanism, letting users call businesses, contact-center agents, or other connected users via a shared cloud service.

meta.status: published application; grant status to be confirmed
meta.notes: Priority 2009-01-28, filed 2021-06-25, published 2021-10-14. Assignee: Virtual Hold Technology Solutions, LLC. Published application; grant status to be confirmed.
